name: Ransomware Affiliate Ecosystem
description: The Ransomware Affiliate Ecosystem represents the operational model where independent intrusion operators gain access to victim environments and then monetize that access through partnerships with ransomware-as-a-service programs. Rather than one fixed threat group, affiliates move between ransom...
strategic_objectives: Monetize unauthorized access through ransomware deployment
Steal sensitive data for double extortion leverage
Sell or broker access between criminal groups
